quick_skim.title: Convergence of Two-Timescale Markovian Stochastic Approximations with Applications in Reinforcement Learning
quick_skim.abstract: This work studies the convergence of two-timescale stochastic approximations (SA), a class of iterative algorithms that update two sets of parameters in fast and slow timescales respectively. Notable examples of two-timescale SA in reinforcement learning (RL) include temporal difference learning with gradient correction (TDC) and actor-critic methods. Previously, the stability (i.e., boundedness) and convergence of two-timescale SA were only established under i.i.d. noise. This work instead establishes the stability and convergence of two-timescale SA under Markovian noise, a setup that is more realistic in RL. Notably, we do not need to use any projection operator and the noise does not need to live in a compact space. Our key technical novelty is to control the fast timescale parameter with the running max of the slow timescale parameter, instead of with the current slow timescale parameter, as most prior works do. As a key application, we establish the first almost sure convergence of TDC with eligibility traces under off-policy learning with linear function approximation.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: two-timescale convergence analysis for actor-critic methods
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 面向演员-评论家方法的两时间尺度收敛性分析
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 面向演员-评论家方法的两时间尺度收敛性分析
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 面向演员-评论家方法的两时间尺度收敛性分析
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Establishes stability and convergence of two-timescale stochastic approximations under Markov noise, directly applicable to actor-critic and TDC algorithms.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 两时间尺度随机逼近的收敛性此前仅在独立同分布噪声下被证明。本文首次在马尔可夫噪声下建立了稳定性和收敛性，且无需投影算子。该结果直接适用于强化学习中的演员-评论家方法及梯度校正时序差分学习。为多智能体系统中常用算法提供了理论保障。虽然未直接涉及多智能体，但其理论对MARL中的值分解与演员-评论家方法比较具有支撑意义。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 两时间尺度随机逼近的收敛性此前仅在独立同分布噪声下被证明。本文首次在马尔可夫噪声下建立了稳定性和收敛性，且无需投影算子。该结果直接适用于强化学习中的演员-评论家方法及梯度校正时序差分学习。为多智能体系统中常用算法提供了理论保障。虽然未直接涉及多智能体，但其理论对MARL中的值分解与演员-评论家方法比较具有支撑意义。
